title: Wire Brush Set, Metal Rust Remover Brushes Handy Steel/Nylon/Brass Brush Set Suitable for Cleaning Welding Slag and Rust 9pcs
features: √ High Quality Brush: Rust remover brush made of brass, stainless steel and nylon, strong and durable, can clean rust and detail completely.
√ Versatile: wire brushes are ideally suited for cleaning steel parts, machinery, unmachined metal parts, paint stains, special corrosion, etc.
√Comfortable handle design: the ergonomic, curved handle of the brush provides a comfortable and firm grip. Each brush has a hole in the handle for easy hanging and storage.
√Wire brush size: Small wire brush: 6.7''/17cm, Medium wire brush: 7''/17.7cm, Large wire brush: 9''/22.8cm
√Package contains: 3 x Steel Brush, 3 x Brass Brush,3 x Nylon Brush
description: Features: Useful for cleaning & light scrubbing. Suitable for cleaning jobs and removal of flaking paint, rust and dirt. Many use around home,graden and workshops. Angled head for reaching awkward locations. With comfortable soft grip handles. Include 3 types of brushes: Steel Brush/Brass Brush/Nylon Brush Steel brush suitable for: Paint,Rust and Corrosion removal on metal. Brass Brush Suitable for : Light metal,Enging spark plugs and Battery cleaning. Nylon brush suitable for: Plastic and upholstery cleaning, Car dash trim and vents Package Include: 3 x Steel Brush（Three sizes 9"，7"，6.9"） 3 x Brass Brush（Three sizes 9"，7"，6.9"） 3 x Nylon Brush（Three sizes 9"，7"，6.9"）
